subtitle.en: Beat the clock: choose the best store for each job
subtitle.zh: 跟時間賽跑：幫每個任務選最適合的儲存

tagline.en: Six storage products, one best answer — pick fast!
tagline.zh: 六種儲存產品，只有一個最佳解，手腳要快！

scenario.en: Your app lets users upload large video files. You want cheap storage with no surprise bandwidth bills when they're downloaded.
scenario.zh: 你的應用讓使用者上傳大型影片檔。你想要便宜的儲存，也不想在下載時被流量帳單嚇到。

why.en: R2 is object storage built for big files, with zero egress fees.
why.zh: R2 是為大檔案打造的物件儲存，流出（egress）完全免費。

scenario.en: You need to store users, orders and products, and run SQL JOINs to build reports.
scenario.zh: 你需要儲存使用者、訂單和商品，並用 SQL JOIN 跑報表。

why.en: D1 is a SQL (SQLite) database — ideal for relational data and JOINs.
why.zh: D1 是 SQL（SQLite）資料庫，最適合關聯式資料和 JOIN。

scenario.en: You want to read small config values with the lowest possible latency from anywhere in the world, and they rarely change.
scenario.zh: 你想從全球各地用最低延遲讀取小型設定值，而且這些值很少變動。

why.en: KV is a globally cached key-value store optimized for fast, read-heavy lookups.
why.zh: KV 是全球快取的鍵值儲存，專為快速、讀取密集的查詢最佳化。

scenario.en: You're building a live chat room where everyone must see the same messages in the same order, coordinated in one place.
scenario.zh: 你要做一個即時聊天室，所有人必須看到相同順序的相同訊息，並由單一地方協調。

why.en: A Durable Object gives one coordination point with strongly consistent state.
why.zh: Durable Object 提供單一協調點，並具備強一致性的狀態。

scenario.en: You already run a Postgres database elsewhere and want your Workers to query it fast with connection pooling and caching.
scenario.zh: 你已經在別處運行一個 Postgres 資料庫，想讓 Workers 透過連線池和快取快速查詢它。

why.en: Hyperdrive pools connections and caches queries to speed up your existing Postgres.
why.zh: Hyperdrive 透過連線池與查詢快取，加速你既有的 Postgres。

scenario.en: After a purchase you must send a confirmation email, but you don't want the user's request to wait for it.
scenario.zh: 購買完成後你要寄出確認信，但不想讓使用者的請求卡在等寄信。

why.en: Queues decouple slow background work so the request can return immediately.
why.zh: Queues 把緩慢的背景工作解耦，讓請求可以立刻回應。

scenario.en: You host a popular podcast archive. Episodes are downloaded millions of times and you want to avoid huge egress bills.
scenario.zh: 你經營一個熱門的 Podcast 典藏庫，集數被下載數百萬次，你想避免龐大的流出費用。

why.en: R2 serves large files with zero egress fees, even at huge download volumes.
why.zh: R2 提供大檔案下載且流出完全免費，即使下載量極大也一樣。

scenario.en: A flash sale has exactly 100 items. You need one source of truth so you never oversell, even under heavy concurrent traffic.
scenario.zh: 限時搶購剛好只有 100 件商品。你需要單一真實來源，即使在高並發流量下也絕不超賣。

why.en: A single Durable Object serializes updates with strong consistency, so it can't oversell.
why.zh: 單一 Durable Object 以強一致性序列化更新，因此不會超賣。

scenario.en: Your image-processing job gets sudden traffic spikes. You want to buffer the load and process items steadily with automatic retries.
scenario.zh: 你的影像處理工作會突然湧入流量。你想緩衝負載、穩定地逐批處理，並自動重試。

why.en: Queues buffer bursts and retry failed jobs, smoothing out spiky workloads.
why.zh: Queues 緩衝突發流量並重試失敗的工作，撫平尖峰負載。
